summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new PM structured checklist features and public breakdown reporting. Backend: 82/83 tests passed (98.8%). Frontend: All critical features verified including public breakdown dialog, PUBLIC badges, and PM checklist builder.

minor_issues.issue: Test expected 400 for deleting department with machines, got 404 (test department doesn't exist)
minor_issues.impact: None - this is a test case issue, not a functional bug

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/pm-tasks with checklist_groups creates task, normalizes groups, derives flat checklist
Backend: GET /api/pm-tasks/{id} returns checklist_groups
Backend: POST /api/pm-tasks/{id}/complete with row_results (status OK/NOT_OK per row) saves completion
Backend: Invalid status value 'MAYBE' rejected with 400
Backend: GET /api/pm-tasks/{id}/pdf returns 200 application/pdf (blank)
Backend: GET /api/pm-tasks/{id}/pdf?completion_id=latest returns completed PDF
Backend: Nonexistent task/completion returns 404
Backend: GET /api/public/report-context works WITHOUT auth (returns lines + machines)
Backend: POST /api/public/breakdowns WITHOUT auth creates breakdown with submitted_via=public_kiosk and auto work order
Backend: Empty reporter_name rejected with 400
Backend: PM templates include checklist_groups (5 seeded templates)
Frontend: Login page shows public 'Report Breakdown' button (data-testid=public-report-breakdown-button)
Frontend: Public breakdown dialog opens without login, allows dept/area/machine selection, reporter name + remarks input
Frontend: Public breakdown submission succeeds WITHOUT logging in (toast with ticket number)
Frontend: After login, Breakdowns page shows PUBLIC badge (data-testid^=public-badge-) on 3 kiosk-submitted tickets
Frontend: PM page New PM Task dialog has checklist builder (data-testid=checklist-builder)
Frontend: Selecting template populates grouped rows with one-to-many structure
Frontend: Can add component (checklist-add-group) and sub-item (checklist-add-item-0)
Frontend: PM task creation succeeds
Frontend: Clicking Complete navigates to /preventive-maintenance/close/{id}
Frontend: Close page shows header fields, grouped table with rowspan, OK/NOT OK toggles per row
Frontend: Submitting with missing statuses shows error
Frontend: Setting all rows + Done By closes task and navigates back
Frontend: PDF download buttons (blank and completed) present on PM rows
Regression: Authenticated breakdown creation works
Regression: Work orders work
Regression: Control room line KPI ribbon visible
Regression: Admin branding section visible
